allow: PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Host "TSC=$LASTEXITCODE"; npm run lint 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10; Write-Host "LINT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Host "TSC=$LASTEXITCODE"; npm run lint 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12; Write-Host "LINT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force . | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq '.git' } | Select-Object Name, Mode, Length; Write-Host '---'; if \(Test-Path .git\) { Get-ChildItem -Force .git | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Stream | Select-Object -First 30 } else { Write-Host 'no .git here' })

PowerShell(try { $v = gh --version 2>&1; Write-Host "GH=$v" } catch { Write-Host 'gh not installed' }; Write-Host '---'; try { git --version } catch { Write-Host 'git not installed' }; Write-Host '---'; git config --global credential.helper 2>&1)
